project_overview.name: Cartola Lab Studio
project_overview.description: A split-panel web application that functions as an AI-powered app creation studio.

theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Since this is a developer tool and dashboard, a highly structured, objective, and function-first interface is required. The dark theme reduces eye strain for long coding sessions, and the electric blue accent (#19afff) acts as the kinetic trigger against deep structural grays.

typography.strategy: The Anti-Default Rule applies. Avoid Inter for headings. Use high-legibility geometric sans for bodies and explicit monospace for technical elements.

accessibility.contrast_requirements: All text must pass WCAG AA contrast ratio. Use APCA preferred.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The Control Room Grid (For Dashboards/Analytics). Density, Data Correlation, Scanability.

structure.header: h-14 fixed top border-b border-[#22222A] bg-[#0A0A0A] flex items-center justify-between px-4 z-50
structure.main_container: h-screen pt-14 flex flex-row overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A]
structure.left_panel: flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-[300px] bg-[#111115] border-r border-[#22222A]
structure.divider: w-1 cursor-col-resize hover:bg-[#19AFFF] active:bg-[#19AFFF] transition-colors bg-[#22222A]

spacing_scale.padding: p-4, p-6 for containers. Density is key, so avoid massive whitespace inside the chat or code windows.

surface_strategies.global: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. No heavy drop shadows. Use 1px borders (#22222A) everywhere to separate panes and toolbars.
surface_strategies.panels: Flat backgrounds. No glassmorphism inside the developer panels. Solid #111115 and #0A0A0A separation.
surface_strategies.buttons: Neumorphism is BANNED. Use flat blocks with sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-md), subtle border-white/5, and hover color shift.
surface_strategies.chat_bubbles: AI (BroStorm) bubbles: bg-[#1A1A20] border border-[#22222A] text-[#EDEDED]. User bubbles: bg-[#19AFFF]/10 border border-[#19AFFF]/20 text-[#19AFFF].

header.actions: Right aligned, New Session (Outline button), Settings (Ghost button)

chat_panel.input_field: Shadcn textarea, resize-none bg-[#0A0A0A] border-[#22222A] focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#19AFFF]

preview_panel.action_bar: h-12 border-b border-[#22222A] flex items-center justify-between px-4 bg-[#111115]
preview_panel.tabs: Shadcn Tabs (Preview | Code). Override default rounded-full to rounded-md.
preview_panel.viewport_selector: Shadcn Dropdown or ToggleGroup (Desktop, Tablet, Mobile) centered in the action bar.
preview_panel.preview_iframe: w-full h-full bg-white transition-all duration-300 mx-auto

approve_task_button.style: bg-[#19AFFF] hover:bg-[#40BDFF] text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2 transition-all

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST explicitly set text color and bg on hover. Buttons should lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) if primary.
motion_and_interactions.streaming: AI response streaming should have a blinking cursor block (`w-2 h-4 bg-[#19AFFF] animate-pulse`) at the end of the text.
motion_and_interactions.divider_drag: Disable pointer events on the iframe while the divider is being dragged to prevent stuttering.

media_and_images.rules: NEVER use placeholder URLs. Always use the provided absolute URLs.

instructions_to_main_agent.installation: Install lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react. Install framer-motion. Install react-split or equivalent for the resizable pane. Use standard Shadcn UI installations (button, tabs, select, textarea, scroll-area).
instructions_to_main_agent.execution_order: 1. Initialize Tailwind with the custom dark colors. 2. Build the Layout shell with Header and Split-Pane. 3. Implement Left Panel (Chat UI, SSE streaming visual logic). 4. Implement Right Panel (Preview/Code toggle, Action Bar). 5. Hook up the viewport dynamic resizing logic by constraining the max-width of the iframe wrapper.
instructions_to_main_agent.code_extraction: Ensure the logic parses the AI response for ```html or ```javascript blocks and pipes them into the iframe srcdoc in real-time.
instructions_to_main_agent.crucial_rule: DO NOT use 'Inter' font for headings. Use the designated typography. Ensure all inputs and buttons have the required data-testid.
